task_completion.description: Verify that the bookmark bar contains exactly the four required folders and no loose bookmarks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser's bookmark bar or bookmark manager shows folders named 'Drug Information', 'Shortages & Recalls', 'Regulatory & Guidelines', and 'Unauthorized_Personal', with no individual bookmark links visible directly on the bar itself.

task_completion.description: Verify that custom site search shortcuts for 'ndc' and 'fda' have been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser's search engine settings page shows custom search engines added with the keywords 'ndc' (pointing to DailyMed) and 'fda' (pointing to Drugs@FDA).

task_completion.description: Verify the browser homepage is set to DailyMed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser's appearance or startup settings show the homepage/startup page explicitly set to 'https://dailymed.nlm.nih.gov'.

task_completion.description: Verify that password saving, address autofill, and payment autofill are disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser's autofill and password manager settings show toggles for saving passwords, saving addresses, and saving payment methods turned off.

task_completion.description: Verify that third-party cookies are blocked.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser's privacy and security settings show the option to 'Block third-party cookies' is selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the default download directory is set correctly and the browser asks where to save files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser's download settings show the default location as '/home/ga/Documents/Rx_Transfers' and the toggle for 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' is turned on.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the actual browser GUI to make these changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the browser's native settings pages and bookmark manager, not terminal commands editing configuration files (like JSON Preferences or sqlite3 databases).

integrity.description: Ensure the bookmark folders were actually created in the browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The folders should appear in the browser's native bookmark bar or bookmark manager UI, not just as text in a document or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not run a script to bypass manual configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show the execution of python or bash scripts that directly modify the browser's profile data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts for the VLM verifier: The required bookmark folders are exactly 'Drug Information', 'Shortages & Recalls', 'Regulatory & Guidelines', and 'Unauthorized_Personal'. The custom search engine keywords must be 'ndc' and 'fda'. The homepage URL must be 'https://dailymed.nlm.nih.gov' (or 'dailymed.nlm.nih.gov'). The default download directory must be exactly '/home/ga/Documents/Rx_Transfers'.
